sentences.target: Il pousse un soupir en s'asseyant.

translations.fr: Il pousse un soupir en s'asseyant.
translations.en: He lets out a sigh while sitting down.
translations.es: Deja escapar un suspiro al sentarse.
translations.de: Er seufzt, während er sich hinsetzt.
translations.it: Emette un sospiro mentre si siede.
translations.pt: Ele solta um suspiro ao se sentar.
translations.vi: Anh ấy thở dài khi ngồi xuống.
translations.nl: Hij zucht terwijl hij gaat zitten.
translations.hi: वह बैठते हुए आह भरता है.
translations.nb: Han sukker mens han setter seg.
translations.sv: Han suckar medan han sätter sig.
translations.ro: El oftează în timp ce se așază.
translations.da: Han sukker, mens han sætter sig.
translations.ja: 彼は腰を下ろしながらため息をつく。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd singular; transitive, selects the direct object 'un soupir'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'soupir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'pousse'.
Preposition introducing a gerundive clause (gérondif) expressing simultaneity/manner.
Present participle in gerund construction (pronominal); controlled by the subject 'Il' (en + gérondif: 'while sitting down').

sentences.target: Je lâche un soupir en fermant la porte.
sentences.reading: /ʒə laʃ œ̃ supiʁ ɑ̃ fɛʁmɑ̃ la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: Je lâche un soupir en fermant la porte.
translations.ipa: /ʒə laʃ œ̃ supiʁ ɑ̃ fɛʁmɑ̃ la pɔʁt/
translations.en: I let out a sigh while closing the door.
translations.es: Suelto un suspiro al cerrar la puerta.
translations.de: Ich seufze, während ich die Tür schließe.
translations.yue: 我閂門嗰陣嘆咗一口氣。
translations.pt: Solto um suspiro ao fechar a porta.
translations.he: אני נאנחת כשאני סוגרת את הדלת.
translations.vi: Tôi thở dài khi đóng cửa.
translations.nl: Ik zucht terwijl ik de deur sluit.
translations.hi: मैं दरवाज़ा बंद करते हुए आह भरती हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg sukker mens jeg lukker døren.
translations.id: Aku menghela napas sambil menutup pintu.
translations.sv: Jag suckar medan jag stänger dörren.
translations.ro: Oftez în timp ce închid ușa.
translations.da: Jeg sukker, mens jeg lukker døren.
translations.ja: ドアを閉めながらため息をつく。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st singular; transitive, taking 'un soupir' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'soupir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'lâche'.
Preposition introducing a gerundive clause (gérondif).
Present participle used as gerund; action concurrent with the main verb; governs the object 'la porte'.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of 'porte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'fermant'.

sentences.target: On entend un soupir derrière le rideau.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃tɑ̃ œ̃ supiʁ dɛʁjɛʁ lə ʁido/

translations.fr: On entend un soupir derrière le rideau.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃tɑ̃ œ̃ supiʁ dɛʁjɛʁ lə ʁido/
translations.en: You can hear a sigh behind the curtain.
translations.es: Se oye un suspiro detrás del telón.
translations.de: Hinter dem Vorhang hört man einen Seufzer.
translations.it: Si sente un sospiro dietro il sipario.
translations.zh-Hans: 帷幕后面传来一声叹息。
translations.yue: 簾幕後面傳來一聲嘆息。
translations.pt: Ouve-se um suspiro atrás da cortina.
translations.tr: Perdenin arkasından bir iç çekiş duyulur.
translations.vi: Có tiếng thở dài phía sau tấm rèm.
translations.nl: Achter het gordijn is een zucht te horen.
translations.hi: परदे के पीछे से आह सुनाई देती है.
translations.el: Πίσω από την κουρτίνα ακούγεται ένας αναστεναγμός.
translations.id: Terdengar sebuah desahan dari balik tirai.
translations.ro: Se aude un oftat din spatele cortinei.
translations.ja: 幕の後ろからため息が聞こえる。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (generic/impersonal or colloquial 'we'), 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd singular; perception verb taking 'un soupir' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'soupir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'entend'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement 'le rideau'.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'rideau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'derrière'.

sentences.target: Tu ranges les courses avec un soupir.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁɑ̃ʒ le kuʁs avɛk œ̃ supiʁ/

translations.fr: Tu ranges les courses avec un soupir.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁɑ̃ʒ le kuʁs avɛk œ̃ supiʁ/
translations.en: You put away the groceries with a sigh.
translations.es: Guardas la compra con un suspiro.
translations.de: Du räumst die Einkäufe seufzend weg.
translations.it: Metti via la spesa con un sospiro.
translations.zh-Hans: 你叹了口气把买来的菜收好。
translations.yue: 你嘆住氣執好買返嚟嘅餸。
translations.pt: Você guarda as compras com um suspiro.
translations.vi: Bạn cất đồ mua về với một tiếng thở dài.
translations.nl: Je ruimt de boodschappen op met een zucht.
translations.hi: तुम आह भरते हुए राशन समेटते हो.
translations.el: Τακτοποιείς τα ψώνια με έναν αναστεναγμό.
translations.nb: Du rydder bort dagligvarene med et sukk.
translations.id: Kamu merapikan belanjaan sambil menghela napas.
translations.sv: Du plockar in matvarorna med en suck.
translations.ro: Pui la loc cumpărăturile cu un oftat.
translations.da: Du lægger varerne på plads με et suk.
translations.ja: ため息をつきながら買ってきた食材を片づける。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Main verb, present indicative 2nd singular; transitive, taking 'les courses' as direct object.
Definite article, plural, determiner of 'courses'.
Common noun, feminine plural; here idiomatically 'groceries/shopping'; direct object of 'ranges'.
Preposition introducing a comitative/manner complement.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'soupir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'avec', expressing manner.
